order_class_code.5: three timed events, at least one adjacent tie
order_class_code.6: evented count and timed count inconsistent

last_dynamic_validation.summary: One approved trial-only PSCAD Run temporarily enabled IBR3_TRIAL__OPEN_STIMULUS, observed the IBR3 local-opening chain at 5.0 s, parsed collector/chronology monitor outputs, and restored IBR3 test enable to 0.
last_dynamic_validation.claim_boundary: Does not validate cascade propagation, physical causality direction, system stability, protection coordination, MATLAB coupling, or general applicability.

last_default_disabled_baseline_validatio.summary: One approved default-disabled PSCAD Run kept IBR2 and IBR3 trial test stimuli at 0; IBR3 open request, command, actual open, and event packet stayed absent. Compared with the prior enabled-stimulus run, this supports a stimulus-specific contrast for the fixed trial configuration only.
last_default_disabled_baseline_validatio.claim_boundary: Does not validate cascade propagation, physical causality direction, system stability, protection coordination, MATLAB coupling, or general applicability.
